description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet labeled 'PLANET DESTROYER' on the marquee, featuring a weathered orange and black exterior with visible signs of wear and scuffing. The front panel houses a large CRT display screen, a control panel with two red joysticks, several black and white buttons, and a prominent red start button. Below the control panel, there is a coin door for inserting tokens or coins, typical of vintage arcade machines. The side panels are plain orange with a gradient of grime and no visible artwork or decals. The back of the cabinet is solid black, heavily scratched and worn, indicating frequent use or movement. The overall structure is boxy and robust, designed to withstand public use in urban entertainment venues.
description: A weathered upright arcade game cabinet with orange sides, a black front, and a 'PLANET DESTROYER' marquee. It features a CRT screen, dual joysticks, multiple buttons, and a coin door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, CRT screen, control panel with two red joysticks and buttons, and a coin door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain orange side panel and the angled control panel protruding from the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid, heavily scratched black back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain orange side and the control panel's profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a thick black bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with two red joysticks and four buttons (three black, one red) arranged in a row, with a central red start button; control panel is black with white markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features bold orange and yellow 'PLANET DESTROYER' text on a black background, with a distressed, retro-futuristic style.
